race.comment: DIVINE BELLINI (8) gave a sight fresh on slow ground at Swan Hill but was run down late. Change of rider and drawn to go forward again. Will strip fitter and take catching. GALACTIC GIRL (9) showed ability at her lone start before a spell. Has been in and out of work twice but fitter for three recent jump-outs so should be primed to run well. GIVE IT A YEAR (14) is a two-year-old gelding making his debut by Almanzor out of Buy Me A Rock. Well-educated and expected to measure up. CABARET QUEEN (7) has been given a let-up and worth noting both career placings have been on rain-affected ground. Expected to improve sharply.
